hooks.command: FILEINFO=$(python -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print(f+'|'+os.path.basename(f))"); FILE=$(echo "$FILEINFO" | cut -d'|' -f1); FNAME=$(echo "$FILEINFO" | cut -d'|' -f2); [ -n "$FILE" ] || exit 0; echo "$FNAME" | grep -qiE '^(README|RUNBOOK|TROUBLESHOOTING|CHANGELOG)\.md$' || exit 0; FDIR=$(python -c "import os,sys; print(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(sys.argv[1])))" "$FILE") && REPO=$(git -C "$FDIR" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$REPO" ] || exit 0; cd "$REPO" && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; git commit -m "docs: update $FNAME"
